embedding query: action: who's oversight text: who who's oversight.

top matches.text: Deployers shall assign human oversight to natural persons who have the necessary competence, training and authority, as well as the necessary support.
Human oversight shall aim to prevent or minimise the risks to health, safety
top matches.embedding text: action: aim object: to prevent or minimise the risks to health, safety actor: Human oversight modal: Mandatory(shall) text: Human oversight shall aim to prevent or minimise the risks to health, safety

top matches.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate:
top matches.embedding text: action: provide object: with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: actor: The Deployer modal: Mandatory(shall) text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate:

top matches.text: The oversight measures shall be ensured through either one or both of the following types of measures:.

top matches.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (a) to properly understand the relevant capacities and limitations of the high-risk AI system and be able to duly monitor the high-risk ai system's operation, including in view of detecting and addressing anomalies, dysfunctions and unexpected performance;

top matches.text: The Deployer SHALL be provided with the high-risk AI system in such a way that natural persons to whom human oversight is assigned are enabled, as appropriate and proportionate: (d) to decide, in any particular situation, not to use the high-risk AI system or to otherwise disregard, override or reverse the output of the high-risk AI system;

top matches.text: The obligations set out in paragraphs 1 and 2, are without prejudice to other deployer obligations under Union or national law and to the deployer's freedom to organise its own resources and activities for the purpose of implementing the human oversight measures indicated by the provider.

The market surveillance authorities other than the market surveillance authority of the Member State initiating the procedure shall, without undue delay, inform the Commission and the other Member States of any measures adopted and of any additional information at their disposal relating to the non-compliance of the AI system concerned, and, in the event of disagreement with the notified national measure, of their objections.
or The Authorities put into service and shall be kept up-to date.
top matches.embedding text: action: be kept object: up-to date. actor: or The Authorities put into service and modal: Mandatory(shall) text: or The Authorities put into service and shall be kept up-to date.

top matches.text: where the market surveillance authority has not provided an answer within 30 days, the testing in real world conditions and the real-world testing plan shall be understood to have been approved

Providers or prospective providers shall notify the national market surveillance authority in the Member State where the testing in real world conditions is to be conducted of the suspension or termination of the testing in real world conditions and of the final outcomes.
In particular, the market surveillance authorities shall indicate whether the non-compliance is due to one or more of the following:
That authority shall without undue delay notify the Commission and the other Member States of those measures.

In particular, the market surveillance authorities shall indicate whether the non-compliance is due to one or more of the following: (b) a failure of a high-risk AI system to meet requirements set out in Chapter III, Section 2;
The Provider SHALL take technical and organisational measures in this regard.
top matches.embedding text: action: take object: technical and organisational measures in this regard. actor: The Provider modal: Mandatory(shall) text: The Provider SHALL take technical and organisational measures in this regard.

top matches.text: In particular, the market surveillance authorities shall indicate whether the non-compliance is due to one or more of the following: (a) non-compliance with the prohibition of the AI practices referred to in Article 5;

Where the operator of an AI system does not take adequate corrective action within the period referred to in paragraph 2, the market surveillance authority shall take all appropriate provisional measures to prohibit or restrict the AI system's being made available on its national market or put into service, to withdraw the product or the standalone AI system from that market or to recall it.
The instructions for use shall contain least the following information: (a) the identity and the contact details of the provider and, where applicable, of use's authorised representative;

top matches.text: Training, validation and testing data sets shall be subject to data governance and management practices appropriate for the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

top matches.text: Particular attention shall be given to AI systems presenting a risk to vulnerable groups.
Those practices shall concern in particular:
